critic.verdict: An exceptionally polished and rhythmically precise chart with fantastic physical flow, minorly held back only by slightly abrupt intro holds.

issues.problem: The 3-beat hold on the BAR lane overlaps with a tap on the NOTE lane at 3.6s, which introduces multi-lane multitasking a bit too early in the warm-up intro for a Standard difficulty chart.
The transition into the first drop features a sudden, untelegraphed jump to continuous eighth-note density. A brief preparatory drum-fill pattern would make this spike feel more natural.

design_notes: S0 sets up the rhythm on the center lane with long holds, introducing standard difficulty expectations while keeping density low. S1 escalates into a dense, high-energy drop characterized by 0.5-beat subdivisions, active outer-lane swaps, and short holds. S2 keeps the intensity going with balanced offbeat syncopations, alternating lanes carefully to guarantee comfortable flow. S3 provides a relaxed outro, returning to steady quarter-note paces to let the player breathe before the song fades.

design_sections.name: Intro
design_sections.intent: Introduce the groove with sparse beats and long, stabilizing BAR holds.

design_sections.name: Drop Build
design_sections.intent: Ramp up density with 0.5-beat syncopation and active lane-switching.

design_sections.name: Main Drop
design_sections.intent: Maintain high energy with playful offbeat motifs and balanced lane distribution.

design_sections.name: Outro
design_sections.intent: Wind down with simplified, quarter-note rhythms and a final satisfying hold.
